error_map.hint: dynamodb request rejected; check table_name/region and that the table exists
dynamodb SigV4 signature invalid or access_key_id/secret_access_key lack access; re-run pm credentials add dynamodb
dynamodb provisioned/on-demand throughput exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: Tier-3 native package (internal/connectors/native/dynamodb): this streams.json entry is documentation/schema-reference only (identity/spec/schema uniformity with every other connector, engine.Base.Definition()); Check/Catalog/Read are hand-written Go (SigV4 signing via connection.go's sign, AttributeValue flattening via cataloger.go's attribute), never routed through engine.Check/engine.Read -- the engine's declarative auth dialect has no SigV4 shape and RequestSpec has no AWS JSON-RPC X-Amz-Target header concept. Proven live by internal/connectors/native/dynamodb's own unit tests (dynamodb_test.go), ported rule-for-rule from legacy internal/connectors/dynamodb's identical test suite (signed-request assertions, pagination-via-LastEvaluatedKey, AttributeValue flattening).
